title: The Architects
content:
{{Top|leg=Celestial/Legends}} {{Otheruses|Architect}} {{Organization |image= |name=The Architects |type= |founder= |leader= |subgroup= |headquarters= |locations=[[Livno III]]''[[Lando's Luck]]'' |formed= |founded= |fragmented= |reorganized= |dissolved= |restored= |affiliation= }} {{Quote|Livno III is too far away from a source of sunlight, so the globes are used to regulate a machine the Architects built long ago on the planet. Without all three, the planet has fallen into ruin.''"
"''The Architects?''"
"''That's what Zel called them. I'm not sure who they are.|Rinetta Gan and [[Landonis Balthazar Calrissian|Lando Calrissian]]|}} '''The Architects''' were an ancient group that saved the [[planet]] [[Livno III]] through the construction of [[Breeze Globe|Breeze]], [[Rain Globe|Rain]], and [[Solstice Globe]]s. Together, the globes powered a machine which regulated the planet's environment. {{Stub}} ==Behind the scenes== The Architects were first mentioned in the [[2018]] junior novel ''[[Lando's Luck]]'', which was written by [[Justina Ireland]]. In [[Star Wars Legends|''Star Wars'' Legends]], the ancient [[Celestial/Legends|Celestials]] were also known as the Architects.''[[The Essential Atlas]]'' The [[Celestial]]s were mentioned in the [[canon]] [[Star Wars comic books|comic book]] [[Lando - Double or Nothing 2|''Lando - Double or Nothing'' 2]], although a connection between the Celestials and the Architects has not been established.[[Lando - Double or Nothing 2|''Lando - Double or Nothing'' 2]] ==Appearances== *''[[Lando's Luck]]'' {{Ab|Lando's Luck (audiobook)}} {{1stm}} ==Notes and references== {{Reflist}} {{DEFAULTSORT:Architects, The}} [[Category:Lynna culture]] [[Category:Wild Space organizations]]
